requests

# Clipboard image helper

rich

# GUI
customtkinter

# PDF generation
img2pdf

# Environment variables
python-dotenv

# Telegram integration
python-telegram-bot

# macOS-specific (optional)
pyobjc; sys_platform == "darwin"
